acceptance_targets: [ch17-craft-01] Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:243, the revised scene must show at least one explicit institutional forcing mechanism and one failed attempt at containment before Gloria announces leave; if the scene still jumps straight from 'upstairs' management to suspension without a new trigger visible to the reader, fail.

[ch17-craft-02] In the revised passage spanning snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:279 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:399, at least one material consequence must occur on page and alter a character's next move before the scene ends. If the fallout is still conveyed only by email quotation plus summary statements such as the final inventory of losses, fail.

findings.acceptance_test: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:243, the revised scene must show at least one explicit institutional forcing mechanism and one failed attempt at containment before Gloria announces leave; if the scene still jumps straight from 'upstairs' management to suspension without a new trigger visible to the reader, fail.
findings.problem: Gloria's turn from containment to immediate administrative leave is causally plausible but under-dramatized by a beat. The chapter establishes an institution that prefers side rooms, process language, and minimization, yet the public reversal arrives so fast that it reads slightly author-forced instead of institutionally compelled.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the transition anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:243 so Gloria's leave order is triggered by one more concrete forcing fact on page: for example, counsel exposure from the sponsor, a preservation warning from the dean's liaison/OIT, or a visible realization that external circulation plus witness alignment has already crossed a departmental threshold. Keep Gloria's earlier containment attempts at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:211 in play so the reversal feels wrestled into, not granted.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passage spanning snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:279 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:399, at least one material consequence must occur on page and alter a character's next move before the scene ends. If the fallout is still conveyed only by email quotation plus summary statements such as the final inventory of losses, fail.
findings.problem: The basement coda names the cost of victory, but too much of that cost arrives as quoted email language and end-of-chapter inventory rather than as a concrete loss happening in scene. That softens the chapter's promised expense into administrative summary at the exact point the fallout should bite hardest.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the aftermath centered on snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:279, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:335, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:399 so at least one downstream consequence breaks in real time inside the room. Options include Omar getting a live funding refusal, Leela learning of a defense/provenance lock that changes her immediate options, or Ben discovering a concrete authorship/advising loss. Keep the institutional emails, but make them catalysts for on-page damage rather than the main vessel of damage.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the absurdity and cruelty of graduate labor without converting the book into caricature or chase-plot menace. In edge cases, prefer the messier and more compromising version of events if it yields stronger human consequence and remains causally plausible; render sex, professional theft, bureaucratic harm, and emotional pettiness with the same specificity as any technical problem.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns vague at the exact point humiliation, erotic charge, class shame, visa fear, or institutional cruelty becomes concrete, rewrite until the cost is materially and socially legible.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High; contractions are the baseline in speech, and uncontracted forms should appear only for deliberate precision, class performance, emotional emphasis, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public and private pressure, ensemble chapters and solitary ones, bureaucratic scenes and domestic scenes, deadline compression and aftermath inventory, so no two adjacent chapters rely on the same structural rhythm or dialogue density.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary literary English grounded in material detail; technical language should appear only when the social reality of the lab requires it, and it should never replace bodily or relational consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person centered on Leela, with occasional brief widenings that register group mood and institutional atmosphere without leaving her interpretive frame.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed observational lines with longer accrual sentences that can carry comedy, shame, and procedural dread in the same movement; quiet chapters should breathe, deadline chapters should tighten without turning telegraphic.
